scenarios.title: The direct /api/capture durable write persists the capture when the client disconnects mid-request
evidenceRefs: internal/api/capture.go (CaptureHandler durable Process call — the fix site)
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: durable Process invoked exactly once with a non-cancelled context under client disconnect; prompt text preserved — Scenario 'BUG-069-003-SCN-001 The direct /api/capture durable write persists the capture when the client disconnects mid-request'.

scenarios.title: Adversarial — the regression FAILS against r.Context() and PASSES after context.WithoutCancel
evidenceRefs: report.md (GREEN run captured after context.WithoutCancel restore)
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: pre-fix RED proof + post-fix GREEN proof — Scenario 'BUG-069-003-SCN-002 Adversarial — the regression FAILS against r.Context() and PASSES after context.WithoutCancel'.

scenarios.title: Shared live-stack E2E disconnect-race regression covers BOTH /api/assistant/turn (BUG-069-002) and /api/capture (this bug) against a real pipeline.Processor
evidenceRefs: tests/integration/capture_disconnect_durability_test.go (AUTHORED shared order-2 regression vs a real pipeline.Processor + Postgres + NATS; sub-test 1 proves an artifact survives in Postgres after Process on context.WithoutCancel(cancelled-request-ctx) — and since submitForProcessing deletes the row on NATS-publish failure, survival proves INSERT + publish both succeeded; ARTIFACTS JetStream LastSeq advance corroborates; sub-test 2 is the adversarial pre-fix loss path proving a raw cancelled ctx persists 0 rows)
report.md (### fixSequence order-2 — shared durability regression AUTHORED; live RUN deferred: environment-constrained)
state.json fixSequence order-2 (shared with BUG-069-002 fixSequence order-2; remains pending — live run not yet executed)
state.json certification.blockers (live-stack regression routed to bubbles.test -> bubbles.validate)
scenarios.linkedDoD: Scope 1 DoD: Live-stack disconnect-durability regression (scenario-specific) + Broader E2E regression suite — regression AUTHORED (tests/integration/capture_disconnect_durability_test.go; processor-level durability both endpoints rely on); live RUN PENDING (environment-constrained), routed to bubbles.test -> bubbles.validate; run via `./smackerel.sh --env test test integration --go-run TestCaptureDisconnectDurability_ProcessorSurvivesClientCancel`.
